## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/validate-skills.sh` locally and it passed
- [ ] Skill `name` matches its directory
- [ ] `description` leads with *when to use* and lists concrete `Symptoms:` phrases
- [ ] Added/updated a worked example in `examples/` (fictional target)
- [ ] Added trigger rows to `evals/triggers.tsv`
- [ ] The skill reasons only from provided input / observed responses — it never fabricates
- [ ] Change stays within the authorized, defensive, read-only ethos
